name: Ably
firstSuccessOutcome: A client connects to Ably and receives a message published to a channel in realtime.

steps.action: Open Ably Pub/Sub getting started guide
Sign up for a free Ably account
Create an app and API key in dashboard
Install Node.js and Ably SDK via npm
Add API key to project .env file
Write index.js to connect, subscribe, publish
Run node index.js to establish connection
See received message logged in the console

name: Deepgram
firstSuccessOutcome: A cURL request to /v1/listen returns a JSON transcript of a hosted audio file.

steps.action: Open Deepgram 'Make your first API request' guide
Create free Deepgram account with $200 credit
Create a Deepgram API key in console
Run cURL POST to /v1/listen with audio URL
Receive JSON transcript in the API response

name: Dolby.io
routeName: Media Processing API: get token and enhance a file
firstSuccessOutcome: App key/secret are exchanged for an access token, then an enhance job is started and returns a job ID.

steps.action: Open Dolby.io media processing docs page
Sign up for free Dolby.io developer account
Copy App Key and Secret from dashboard
Set app key and secret as environment variables
POST key/secret to auth API for access token
Submit media enhance job with input URL
Receive job ID confirming request accepted

name: imgix
routeName: Quick Start: create a Source and serve an asset
firstSuccessOutcome: Requesting your imgix.net subdomain URL returns a processed asset in the browser.

steps.action: Open imgix Quick Start guide
Sign up or sign in to imgix account
Create a Source pointing to asset storage
Enter storage details and access credentials
Choose a unique imgix.net subdomain
Click Deploy Source and wait for deployment
Open subdomain asset URL in browser

name: LiveKit
routeName: LiveKit Cloud realtime quickstart (join a room)
firstSuccessOutcome: A client connects to a LiveKit Cloud room using a token and realtime audio/video flows.

steps.action: Open LiveKit Cloud getting started docs
Sign up for free LiveKit Cloud account
Create project; copy URL, API key, secret
Install LiveKit server and client SDKs
Generate an access token with server SDK
Connect client to room URL using token
See connection established and media flowing

name: Sinch
routeName: SMS API getting started (send first SMS)
firstSuccessOutcome: A POST to the SMS API sends a text message from your free trial virtual number.

steps.action: Open Sinch SMS API getting started guide
Sign up for free Sinch Build account
Use free virtual number created at signup
Copy Service Plan ID and API token
POST to SMS API with credentials and number
Recipient receives SMS; API returns success

name: Telnyx
firstSuccessOutcome: A cURL POST to /v2/messages sends an SMS between two Telnyx numbers.

steps.action: Open Telnyx 'Send your first message' guide
Create free Telnyx account
Buy two Telnyx numbers via Search & Buy
Create messaging profile; assign both numbers
Copy your API key from the portal
cURL POST to /v2/messages with from/to/text
Recipient number receives the SMS
